name: Hetch Hetchy / O'Shaughnessy Dam
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: San Francisco water and power : a history of the Municipal Water Department & Hetch Hetchy system
documents.creator: Hanson, Warren D,Kukula, Frank,Nelson, Christopher,Williams, Mary
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 2005 SFPL history of the Municipal Water Department and Hetch Hetchy System, whose timeline dates the O'Shaughnessy Dam to 1919-1923 and its raising to store 360,360 acre feet.

documents.title: San Francisco water and power : a history of the Municipal Water Department and Hetch Hetchy system
documents.creator: Hanson, Warren D,Milner, Anne,Hansell, Franz T
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1999 edition of the same municipal water history, tracing the Hetch Hetchy System from the 1913 Raker Act to the delivery of Sierra Nevada water by 1934.

documents.title: Annual report
documents.creator: San Francisco Public Utilities Commission. Hetch Hetchy Water and Power System,San Francisco Public Utilities Commission. Bureau of Light, Heat and Power
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: The 1975-76 annual report of the Hetch Hetchy Water and Power System, noting the dam was raised an additional 85.5 feet and the system's roughly $100 million cost.

documents.title: San Francisco water and power
documents.creator: Leonard, James H,Hetch Hetchy Water and Power System
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1979 San Francisco Water and Power booklet published by the Hetch Hetchy Water and Power System, with a section on O'Shaughnessy Dam and the origin of the Hetch Hetchy name.
